description.value:
Garden World

Garden worlds are verdant, temperate planets blessed with abundant natural resources and stable ecosystems. Their inhabitants enjoy a quality of life far above that of most Imperial citizens, with clean air, open skies, and plentiful food. This relative comfort breeds sociable, personable individuals — but it can also leave them unprepared for the grim realities of the wider Imperium. Garden worlders bring grace and charm, though they may find the horrors of the galaxy more shocking than most.

Homeworld Bonus

+Fellowship, +Agility, –Toughness

Homeworld Aptitude

Social

Wounds

8+1d5

Fate Threshold

2 (Emperor's Blessing 5+)

Starting Skills

Charm or Commerce

Homeworld Trait

Serenity of the Green: +10 bonus to Willpower tests to resist Fear caused by natural creatures and environments.

specialAbilities.name: Serenity of the Green
specialAbilities.description: +10 bonus to Willpower tests to resist Fear caused by natural creatures and environments.

system.notes: Emperor's Blessing: On a roll of 5+ on 1d10, the character begins with an extra Fate Point.
